<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `go test ./... -race` passes
- [ ] `gofmt -w .` and `go vet ./...` are clean
- [ ] Cross-platform build still works (`make cross`) if I touched OS-specific code
- [ ] I did not weaken any "value never leaks" security invariant
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
